LanguageData.Architect.description: An expertise in creating complex and beautiful buildings.
LanguageData.Architect.label: Architecture
LanguageData.BattlefieldMedic.description: An expertise at rapid treatment and medical tend speed.
LanguageData.BattlefieldMedic.label: First Aid
LanguageData.Blunt.description: An expertise in the fast-paced armed melee combat.
LanguageData.Blunt.label: Dueling
LanguageData.Butcher.description: An expertise in butchering dead animals.
LanguageData.Butcher.label: Butchering
LanguageData.CloseQuarters.description: An expertise in aiming when firing both high-tech and low-tech ranged weapons.
LanguageData.CloseQuarters.label: Aiming
LanguageData.Driller.description: An expertise in using a deep drill to mine resources more efficiently.
LanguageData.Driller.label: Drilling
LanguageData.DrugChef.label: Drug Cooking
LanguageData.Flooring.label: Flooring
LanguageData.Forager.description: An expertise in living off the land and foraging the fruits of the forest.
LanguageData.Forager.label: Foraging
LanguageData.Foreman.description: An expertise in constructing massive amounts of buildings quickly and efficiently.
LanguageData.Foreman.label: Building
LanguageData.Geologist.description: An expertise in rocks and obtaining more stone chunks when digging.
LanguageData.Geologist.label: Geology
LanguageData.GreenThumb.description: An expertise in quickly sowing and harvesting large amounts of plants.
LanguageData.GreenThumb.label: Sowing
LanguageData.Gunner.description: An expertise in reloading both high-tech and low-tech ranged weapons.
LanguageData.Gunner.label: Reloading
LanguageData.Hacker.description: An expertise in hacking terminals and ancient systems.
LanguageData.Hacker.label: Hacking
LanguageData.HarvesterCareful.description: An expertise in ensuring no parts of the plant are wasted on harvesting.
LanguageData.HarvesterCareful.label: Harvesting
LanguageData.Hunter.description: An expertise in the art of hunting.
LanguageData.Hunter.label: Hunting
LanguageData.IndustrialChef.description: An expertise in creating large amounts of meals to feed many people quickly.
LanguageData.IndustrialChef.label: Feeding
LanguageData.IndustrialProcessExpert.description: An expertise in crafting components efficiently.
LanguageData.IndustrialProcessExpert.label: Fabricating
LanguageData.InfectiousDiseaseExpert.description: An expertise in caring for ill patients, suffering from various diseases.
LanguageData.InfectiousDiseaseExpert.label: Nursing
LanguageData.MechanoidExpert.description: An expertise in all things mechanoids, including shredding and disassembling them.
LanguageData.MechanoidExpert.label: Disassembler
LanguageData.Negotiator.description: An expertise in handling negotiations and trading.
LanguageData.Negotiator.label: Negotiating
LanguageData.OreExpert.description: An expertise in digging up ore and finding more of it.
LanguageData.OreExpert.label: Prospecting
LanguageData.Pharmacologist.description: An expertise in creating complex drugs efficiently.
LanguageData.Pharmacologist.label: Synthesizing
LanguageData.Precision.description: An expertise in accuracy when firing both high-tech and low-tech ranged weapons.
LanguageData.Precision.label: Sharpshooting
LanguageData.Proselytizer.description: An expertise in converting others to their own ways of thinking.
LanguageData.Proselytizer.label: Proselytizing
LanguageData.QualityExpert.description: An expertise in creating works of art with increased quality.
LanguageData.QualityExpert.label: Art Quality
LanguageData.QuantityExpert.description: An expertise in creating works of art quickly and efficiently.
LanguageData.QuantityExpert.label: Art Quantity
LanguageData.Rancher.description: An expertise in ranching and animal produce gathering.
LanguageData.Rancher.label: Ranching
LanguageData.Repairman.description: An expertise in repairing broken down and damaged structures.
LanguageData.Repairman.label: Repairing
LanguageData.Researcher.description: An expertise in researching new technologies.
LanguageData.Researcher.label: Researching
LanguageData.Sharp.description: An expertise in armor piercing when using sharp melee weapons.
LanguageData.Sharp.label: Piercing
LanguageData.Surgeon.description: An expertise in performing safe and effective surgeries.
LanguageData.Surgeon.label: Surgery
LanguageData.Tailor.description: An expertise in tailoring excellent clothes.
LanguageData.Tailor.label: Tailoring
LanguageData.Tamer.description: An expertise in taming wild animals.
LanguageData.Tamer.label: Taming
LanguageData.TopChef.description: An expertise in creating safe to consume meals in any environment.
LanguageData.TopChef.label: Food Hygiene
LanguageData.Trainer.description: An expertise in handling and training colony animals.
LanguageData.Trainer.label: Handling
LanguageData.Treespeaker.description: An expertise in communicating psychically and pruning the Gauranlen trees.
LanguageData.Treespeaker.label: Pruning
LanguageData.Tunneller.description: An expertise in digging massive tunnels and caverns.
LanguageData.Tunneller.label: Tunnelling
LanguageData.VSE_DarkStudy.description: An expertise in analyzing and learning from entities and absorbing dark knowledge.
LanguageData.VSE_DarkStudy.label: Dark study
LanguageData.VSE_Lovin.description: An expertise in lovinâ€™ and social impact.
LanguageData.VSE_Lovin.label: Lovin'
LanguageData.VSE_Operating.description: An expertise in performing surgeries quickly and efficiently.
LanguageData.VSE_Operating.label: Operating
LanguageData.VSE_Smoothing.description: An expertise in smoothing surfaces such as walls and floors.
LanguageData.VSE_Smoothing.label: Smoothing
LanguageData.VSE_Sniping.description: An expertise in firing ranged weapons over much longer distances.
LanguageData.VSE_Sniping.label: Sniping
LanguageData.VSE_Striking.description: An expertise in hitting accurately with melee attacks.
LanguageData.VSE_Striking.label: Striking
LanguageData.VSE_Writing.description: An expertise in both reading and writing books in a timely manner.
LanguageData.VSE_Writing.label: Writing
LanguageData.Warden.description: An expertise in handling prisoners and slaves, recruiting them and arresting them if needed.
LanguageData.Warden.label: Wardening
LanguageData.Weaponsmith.description: An expertise in creating excellent weapons.
LanguageData.Weaponsmith.label: Weaponsmithing
